rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.0012, which governs annual public meetings on special education student performance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 29.0012. ANNUAL MEETING ON SPECIAL EDUCATION.
_note: Rule text concerns special education performance meetings; no fiscal or operational nexus to homestead exemption levels.
